name: aurora-login
title: Aurora Login
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Full-page login card centered on Aurora radial page wash. Features Labby stacked-plane mark + wordmark, email/password fields with show/hide toggle, Style D glow-border sign-in button, forgot password link, magic-link sent state with envelope icon, and 6-box OTP input that auto-advances on keystroke for 2FA.
docs:
Aurora block that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@components/aurora/login.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-input`, `aurora-input-otp`.
